conditions.title: Conditions
conditions.description: Products must be returned in original packaging and undamaged

section1.title: § 1 Scope of Application
section1.content1: These Terms and Conditions (hereinafter "Terms") apply to all orders placed through the ProWerk online shop (hereinafter "Provider").
section1.content2: Deviating conditions of the customer are not recognized unless the provider expressly agrees to their validity in writing.

section2.title: § 2 Contract Formation
section2.content1: The presentation of products in the online shop does not constitute a legally binding offer, but an non-binding online catalog.
section2.content2: By clicking the "Place Order" button, you place a binding order for the goods contained in the shopping cart.
section2.content3: The purchase contract is concluded when the provider accepts the order by order confirmation email or ships the goods.

section3.title: § 3 Prices and Payment Terms
section3.content1: All prices include statutory VAT and other price components. Prices are stated in CHF (Swiss Francs), with conversion to EUR (Euro) as guidance.
section3.paymentTerms: For prepayment, the invoice amount must be transferred within 14 days of receiving the invoice. Goods will be shipped after payment receipt.

section4.title: § 4 Delivery and Shipping
section4.content1: Delivery is made to the delivery address specified by the customer throughout Europe.
section4.shipping: Shipping is via DHL. Shipping costs are included in the purchase price (free shipping throughout Europe).
section4.availability: In case of unavailability of goods, the customer will be informed immediately. In this case, the contract does not become effective.

section5.title: § 5 Right of Withdrawal
section5.right: You have the right to withdraw from this contract within fourteen days without giving reasons.
section5.period: The withdrawal period is fourteen days from the day on which you or a third party designated by you, who is not the carrier, took possession of the goods.
section5.exercise: To exercise your right of withdrawal, you must inform us (ProWerk, Email: info@prowerkgm.ch) of your decision to withdraw from this contract by means of a clear statement.
section5.refund: If you withdraw from this contract, we will refund all payments we have received from you immediately and at the latest within fourteen days from the day we were informed of your decision to withdraw from this contract.

section6.title: § 6 Warranty and Guarantee
section6.warranty: All products have a 3-year manufacturer warranty from the date of purchase. The warranty conditions are governed by the respective manufacturer specifications.
section6.coverage: The warranty includes free repair or replacement for manufacturing defects and material defects.
section6.exclusions: Excluded from warranty are damages caused by:

section7.title: § 7 Limitation of Liability
section7.unlimited: The provider is liable without limitation for damages arising from injury to life, body or health based on intentional or negligent breach of duty.
section7.limited: For other damages, the provider is only liable for breach of essential contractual obligations, but limited in amount to damages foreseeable at the time of contract conclusion and typical for the contract.
section7.excluded: Liability for indirect damages and lost profits is excluded.

section8.title: § 8 Data Protection
section8.processing: The provider collects and processes personal data only within the framework of legal provisions.
section8.details: Detailed information on data protection can be found in our privacy policy.
section8.usage: Your data is used exclusively for contract processing and is not passed on to third parties.

section9.title: § 9 Final Provisions
section9.germanLaw: The law of the Federal Republic of Germany applies, excluding the UN Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods.
section9.court: The place of jurisdiction for all disputes is the seat of the provider, provided the customer is a merchant, legal entity under public law or special fund under public law.
section9.validity: Should individual provisions of these Terms be or become invalid, the validity of the remaining provisions remains unaffected.
section9.modification: The provider reserves the right to change these Terms. Customers will be informed of changes by email.
